{"@timestamp":"2026-03-11T12:38:22.6401181-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    select
        sel1_0.id,
        sel1_0.created_at,
        sel1_0.event_id,
        sel1_0.event_type,
        sel1_0.last_error,
        sel1_0.max_retries,
        sel1_0.next_retry_at,
        sel1_0.payload,
        sel1_0.processed_at,
        sel1_0.retry_count,
        sel1_0.status,
        sel1_0.updated_at 
    from
        public.stripe_event_logs sel1_0 
    where
        sel1_0.status=? 
        and sel1_0.next_retry_at is not null 
        and sel1_0.next_retry_at<=localtimestamp 
    order by
        sel1_0.next_retry_at 
    fetch
        first 10 rows only","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"scheduler-2","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}

{"@timestamp":"2026-03-11T12:38:22.9083346-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    select
        sel1_0.id,
        sel1_0.created_at,
        sel1_0.event_id,
        sel1_0.event_type,
        sel1_0.last_error,
        sel1_0.max_retries,
        sel1_0.next_retry_at,
        sel1_0.payload,
        sel1_0.processed_at,
        sel1_0.retry_count,
        sel1_0.status,
        sel1_0.updated_at 
    from
        public.stripe_event_logs sel1_0 
    where
        sel1_0.status=? 
        and sel1_0.next_retry_at is not null 
        and sel1_0.next_retry_at<=localtimestamp 
    order by
        sel1_0.next_retry_at 
    fetch
        first 10 rows only","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"scheduler-4","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
